response.revised_prompt: IMG2IMG transform. Use the reference only for the concept of a front-facing ghost paperdoll in a dark RPG card. Create an original Duskfell ghost player-card state: hooded shroud, ragged hem, visible bare feet fading into mist, arms bent and hands open in a weapon-ready paperdoll pose for future overlays. Strong old-school RPG sprite-paperdoll style, chunky pixel clusters, hard edges, limited grey-blue palette, stepped highlights, eerie but readable at UI scale. Dark burgundy-to-black card backdrop. No UI buttons, no text, no watermark, no copied Ultima Online assets, no photorealism.
